Bias: bullish on higher tf, bearish on lower tf
Emotions: ambivalent, angry, anxious, calm, confident, excited, fearful, frustrated, i was stable before entering but not while in the trade, stressed
Entry Logic Explanation: fear of missing out, key levels, fvg, ob, stayed conservative on entry and market aggressively filled it, waited for pivot retracement
Entry Model: catching the move of the day
How Did The Trade Play Out?: profitable, kind of as expected, came back to my original idea

Notes For Coaches: i had been waiting all day for this trade; then when i went to take it after my web3 class at 21:00, i rushed in as my trade projection on trading view had to be resetup for some reason it dropped the limit orders and had i honored that being help from higher power i could have gotten a better entry, a lot of praying and committed to taking a larger loss to take the chance for that long compression in asis session to finally break down in london :-)

What I Did Well: accepted it, comitted to plan, exited in profit, journaled and documented data, realized the trade was moving the opposite direction, realized we were caught in strong level of buying and selling, took into consideration many different confluences
